title: galatella linosyris subsp. armoricana
intro: Galatella linosyris subsp. armoricana is a subspecies of Galatella linosyris, a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is native to the Armorican Peninsula in France and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, thanks to its ability to reduce inflammation and fight off infections. Traditionally, Galatella linosyris subsp. armoricana has been prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is used to promote overall health and well-being, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects.
